segment.source: Renders a boxed, color-coded note in info, warning, success, danger, or note variant with an optional heading and required rich-text content, marked up as role=note. Use it for: important asides in articles and documentation — tips, cautions, prerequisites, deadlines, legal or safety notes lifted from highlighted boxes in a source document. Prefer 'Inline Alert Notice' for short one-line messages, 'Notification' for dismissible toasts, 'Content Highlight' to emphasize a body passage.
